title: pentaptilon careyi
intro: Pentaptilon careyi is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. It is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent. The plant's health benefits include reducing swelling and promoting wound healing, as well as its potential to lower fever and relieve respiratory issues. Pentaptilon careyi can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
